posts.raw_content:
Ohio patriots work hard, and pay their taxes. Meanwhile in Columbus, one Somali landlord owns 7 buildings packed with 288 "home health" companies. These outfits billed Medicaid $250 MILLION. 

Investigators from Daily Wire walk in: empty rooms. Paper signs saying "employees stepped out." No patients. No real care happening. Just shells sucking up your money like a vacuum.

https://thehill.com/opinion/robbys-radar/5864311-ohio-medicaid-waste-fraud/

This isn't one bad apple. It's an empire built on fake billing for years. Obama-era DHS guy helping set it up. Trucking companies, daycares, home health all tied together. Money flows to owners and then into political donations. The whole network knew the game: come here for the American Scam, not the Dream.

https://washingtonstand.com/article/massive-somali-home-health-care-fraud-scheme-discovered-in-american-heartland

Vivek Ramaswamy saw the report and dropped the hammer: "This is unacceptable & will end when I’m elected. We will prosecute the lawbreakers & put the saved dollars back in the hands of Ohioans. It’s shameful that socialist Amy Acton appears to condone this by ignoring it."

https://x.com/VivekGRamaswamy/status/2052531230898614506

Amy Acton. The democrat who wants to run your state as governor. The one who stayed silent while this waste exploded under her watch as health director. Your dollars paying for ghost companies and middlemen instead of real Ohio families.

Luke Rosiak went deep, DOGE data backs it, it's worse than you think. Part 2 just dropped showing the full underworld:

https://www.dailywire.com/news/inside-ohios-home-health-empire-7-buildings-288-medicaid-companies-250-million

Ohioans: this is your money. Your state. November 2026 is the vote to shut it down.

Get out and vote. Make sure Acton never gets the governor's seat to keep this circus running. Put a stop to it. Save Ohio. 

Eyes open, patriots.
